languages.text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever Eogunn deals shock or energy damage, they also deal {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} shock damage with 50% armour penetration to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.
While Eogunn has {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, this damage is dealt only to Eogunn instead.

Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.
While Eogunn is suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, this damage is dealt only to Eogunn instead.

Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.
While Eogunn is suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, this {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} is dealt only to Eogunn instead.

languages.text: Когда Эоганн наносит электрический или {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетический урон{/g}, он дополнительно наносит {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя.
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text:
Когда Эоганн наносит электрический или {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетический урон{/g}, он дополнительно наносит {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя.
Если у Эоганна {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломаны ребра{/g}, этот {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} наносится только самому Эоганну.

Когда Эоганн наносит электрический или {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}энергетический урон{/g}, он дополнительно наносит {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} с 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 2 клеток вокруг себя.
Если у Эоганна {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломаны ребра{/g}, этот {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урон{/g} наносится только самому Эоганну.

languages.text: Cada vez que Eogunn inflige {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}daño de energía{/g} o conmoción, también inflige {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas situadas en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor.
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: Cada vez que Eogunn inflige {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}daño de energía{/g} o conmoción, también inflige {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas situadas en un radio de 2 casillas a su alrededor.

languages.text: Verursacht Eogunn Schock- oder {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g}, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 2 Feldern außerdem {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 50 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu.
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: Verursacht Eogunn Schock- oder {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}Energieschaden{/g}, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 2 Feldern außerdem {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 50 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu.

languages.text: Eogunn, her şok veya {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}enerji hasarı{/g} verdiğinde ayrıca etrafındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm yaratıklara da %50 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: Eogunn, her şok veya {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}enerji hasarı{/g} verdiğinde ayrıca etrafındaki 2 hücrelik yarıçap içindeki tüm yaratıklara da %50 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir.

languages.text: Lorsqu'Eogunn inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}dégâts d'énergie{/g} ou d'électrocution, il inflige également {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 2 cases autour de lui.
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: Lorsqu'Eogunn inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}dégâts d'énergie{/g} ou d'électrocution, il inflige également {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 50 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 2 cases autour de lui.

languages.text: 每当伊奥贡造成电击或{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}能量伤害{/g}时，还会对其周围2格内的所有生物造成附带50%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: 每当伊奥贡造成电击或{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}能量伤害{/g}时，还会对其周围2格内的所有生物造成附带50%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e}点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}。

languages.text: エオガンがショックまたは{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}を与えるたびに、彼を中心とした半径2マス以内の全クリーチャーに{uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を50%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}でも与える。
languages.original_text: Whenever Eogunn deals shock or {g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}energy damage{/g}, he also deals {uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e} {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 50% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 2-cell radius around him.

traits.locale_text: エオガンがショックまたは{g|Encyclopedia:EnergyDamage}エネルギーダメージ{/g}を与えるたびに、彼を中心とした半径2マス以内の全クリーチャーに{uip|Damage|2f4804b02eee4e03936aaf87e5c5b97e}の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を50%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}でも与える。
